content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed workstream generation changes on feat/9ni34-workstream-generation: bundle.rs validation split into Compatibility (priority 0..=4) and Generated (1..=3) modes with strict metadata checks; dependency graph analysis with Kosaraju SCC-based interleaving detection and DFS cycle detection; canonicalization consistently pairs with both validate() and validate_generated() paths; GeneratedMilestoneBundle newtype forces explicit_id=true via From impls; deferred-item collection with keyword/bigram matching; enhanced render_plan_md_checked with Summary/Dependency Graph/Deferred Items sections; template_catalog prompt enhanced with structured guidance; requirements_drafting contracts now parse GeneratedMilestoneBundle and dispatch validate_generated(). Canonical ID generation verified to match across canonicalize_bundle and canonicalize_dependency_nodes (same iteration order, same implicit-bead counter). Priority-range narrowing, required metadata fields, and bidirectional acceptance-criteria coverage are all reachable only via validate_generated(), preserving backward compatibility for existing fixtures. Tests cover happy paths, cycle detection, interleaved groups, deferred note extraction, schema generation, and legacy handoff compatibility. No blocking correctness, safety, or robustness issues found.

## Amendments

None.
